exemptions.preview/lib/bootstrap.js: Depends on preview simulator and surface registries that still need a dedicated typing pass.
exemptions.preview/lib/simulators.js: Large family/app simulation monolith with many implicit runtime value shapes still to model.
exemptions.preview/lib/surfaces.js: Legacy surface entrypoint re-export pending a surface-registry typing pass.
exemptions.preview/lib/surfaces/detail.js: Surface detail builders still rely on broad config object shapes and DOM-heavy implicit contracts.
exemptions.preview/lib/surfaces/graph-and-meter.js: Graph and meter surface builders still need shared surface model typedefs before clean checkJs coverage.
exemptions.preview/lib/surfaces/index.js: Surface orchestration imports untyped builders that are still tracked via explicit exemptions.
exemptions.preview/lib/surfaces/registry.js: Surface registry depends on untyped builder signatures that still need shared JSDoc contracts.
exemptions.preview/lib/surfaces/shared.js: Shared surface helpers still depend on broad untyped surface config and simulator state objects.
exemptions.tools/export-targets.mjs: Top-level export orchestration still needs a second typing pass after helper extraction.
exemptions.tools/lib/benchmark-harness.mjs: Benchmark harness mixes native compile orchestration, wasm execution, and JSON report assembly with loose data shapes.
exemptions.tools/lib/export-faust-tools.mjs: Faust export helper still needs stricter runtime and stager typedefs.
exemptions.tools/lib/export-manifest-tools.mjs: Manifest generation remains the heaviest string-builder module and needs a dedicated typing pass.
exemptions.tools/run-benchmarks.mjs: Benchmark driver still depends on untyped benchmark and export helper payloads.
